description: Controls coordinate plane visibility in 3D graphs. Each argument toggles a plane: 0 hides, 1 shows. Arguments are positional: (xy, yz, xz). Called with no arguments hides all planes.
utility: Show or hide coordinate planes in 3D views

alternates.description: Show XY and XZ, hide YZ

examples.expression: cube3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 3, noplanes(), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
cylinder3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 3, 5, noplanes(1, 0, 0), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
